title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube video covering major AI news including robot technology (Happy Horse), multi-agent systems (recursive agents), and new model releases (SenseNova U1, Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5). The segment highlights 20+ tools and models spanning vision, animation, 3D generation, and language models from organizations like NVIDIA, Anthropic, xAI, and Mistral.
